quoteFirst: After Mrs. Cooper moved to Louisville I made acquaintance with Mrs. Jennie McKee, a real lady of high moral and truthful qualities, who had wonderful medial gifts, and permitted me to come to her residence, No. 47-1/2 Sherman avenue, Cincinnati, for a slate-writing seance weekly, every Thursday, from
quoteLast: The spirits wrote independent, in broad daylight, when she held the slate under the stand, which was never covered with any thing, and with a pencil so small (about one-eighth part of a common wheat grain) that no human fingers in the body could write with it.
title: A Book Written by the Spirits of the So-Called Dead
author: Helleberg, Carl Gustav [Compiler]
